read_snapshot_summary.summary: Read operator snapshot, allocator state, regime, and live heartbeat.

read_log_summaries.summary: Inspect bounded server logs and summarize health, errors, and latency symptoms.

read_self_audit.summary: Read the bounded self-audit report and surface current bug-hunt priorities without changing the server.

launch_whitelist_research.summary: Launch only allowlisted research tasks from research_nightly_queue.json.

compare_backtest_results.summary: Collect and compare annual and WF summaries from completed research runs.

propose_env_changes.summary: Suggest env/config changes through approval queues or safe param overlays.

server_deploy.summary: Server deploy remains disabled for AI unless DEEPSEEK_EXECUTOR_ALLOW_SERVER_DEPLOY=1 is explicitly set.
